scripts.smoke:qa:chrome: cross-env ENV=qa BROWSER=chromium npm run smoke
scripts.smoke:qa:firefox: cross-env ENV=qa BROWSER=firefox npm run smoke
scripts.smoke:qa:webkit: cross-env ENV=qa BROWSER=webkit npm run smoke
scripts.reg:uat:chrome: cross-env ENV=uat BROWSER=chromium npm run regression
scripts.reg:uat:firefox: cross-env ENV=uat BROWSER=firefox npm run regression
scripts.acc:uat:chrome: cross-env ENV=uat BROWSER=chromium npm run acceptance
scripts.acc:prod:chrome: cross-env ENV=prod BROWSER=chromium npm run acceptance
scripts.acc:prod:firefox: cross-env ENV=prod BROWSER=firefox npm run acceptance
